description: Knowledge graph schema with entity types, relationship types, and data bindings to lakehouses

definition_parts.description: Entity type with properties, namespace must be 'usertypes'
Data binding linking entity to lakehouse table

flags.--dir: Directory with Fabric ontology structure (EntityTypes/, RelationshipTypes/)
flags.--decode: Add decodedPayload field to get-definition output

notes: Data binding sourceType must be FIRST key in sourceTableProperties (JSON key ordering matters!)
Data binding IDs must be valid UUIDs (non-UUID values are silently dropped)
Property value types: String, Boolean, DateTime, Object, BigInt, Double
Entity type required: id, namespace ('usertypes'), name, namespaceType ('Custom')
